task_text: Look at q2_deliverables_checklist.txt and tell me how many items are marked 'overdue'. Give me the count and list the overdue item names.

content.text: Let me read that file right away!

content.content:
Project Helios — Q2 Deliverables Checklist

[DONE]      Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE]      System architecture design
[DONE]      API gateway implementation
[DONE]      Development environment setup

[OVERDUE]   Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
[OVERDUE]   UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01; blocked by Meridian IT access)
[OVERDUE]   Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05; owner: Derek Okafor)

content.text:
Based on the checklist, there are **3 overdue items** in the Q2 deliverables for Project Helios. Here they are:

1. **Integration test suite setup** — Was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20.
2. **UAT environment provisioning** — Was due 2026-07-01; currently blocked by Meridian IT access.
3. **Performance benchmarking report** — Was due 2026-07-05; owner is Derek Okafor.

Would you like to take any action on these items, such as sending a follow-up email or scheduling a meeting to address them?
